storyline: VanEck Gold Miners (GDX) ran ~3x from Jan-2025 to a Feb-2026 peak on Trump's tariff trade war -> safe-haven gold. Now properly TESTED and NOT caught — sonnet5, the tariff seed, the corrected 2024-11 -> 2026-04 window, tariff coverage in the pool: the curator declined to name GDX and parked in SPY (the +24% shown is just the SPY floor, no gem went live). Why it's a genuine non-fit: gold is a second-order, diffuse safe-haven beneficiary of tariffs - not the direct catalyst vehicle the way MP is to rare-earth curbs or RNMBY to the rearmament vote. The gate names direct vehicles and rejects indirect safe-havens - so GDX's big price run is one the solution correctly doesn't chase. Stays greyed.

seeds.title: Gold miners break out as bullion hits records
seeds.snippet: The gold-miners ETF (GDX) is breaking out as bullion sets records on central-bank buying and rate-cut hopes — miners lag the metal and have room.

seeds.title: Gold hits a new record as Trump's tariffs and inflation fears drive a safe-haven surge
seeds.snippet: Gold set a fresh record as President Trump's tariff trade war and inflation fears drive safe-haven demand. The gold-miners ETF (GDX), leveraged to the bullion price, is the pure play on the move - a specific, datable policy shock, still early as the tariff escalation builds.

gems.thesis: Rocket Lab signs deal with Japan's JAXA space agency

RKLB.thesis: Rocket Lab signs deal with Japan's JAXA space agency
RKLB.exit_case: JAXA deal already signed and announced this week — the specific catalyst has occurred.
RKLB.assessment: Rocket Lab signed a deal with JAXA, sending shares to record highs the same week the news broke. This is a discrete, dated catalyst that has now fully resolved publicly — press coverage is already framing it as 'should you buy here' (mainstream, reactive coverage), meaning the edge of buying ahead of the announcement is gone. No scheduled next step (e.g., a specific launch date, a follow-on JAXA contract vote, or regulatory approval still pending) is cited in coverage; only generic bullishness on the broader space-stock theme remains. Per the framework, a signed/closed deal fully priced into a new ATH with no concrete next catalyst ahead means the specific thesis is resolved even though the stock may continue to run on broader momentum.
RKLB.exit_advice: Deal is public, stock already hit new all-time highs on the news — exit; no concrete follow-on catalyst specified beyond the signed deal.
